name: job-tracker
description: Full-stack job application tracker with React, Node.js, Express, Prisma, SQLite, JWT authentication, document uploads, cover letters, status tracking, and dashboard analytics.

scripts.build: npm install --prefix server && npm install --include=dev --prefix client && npm run build --prefix client && npx prisma generate --schema=server/prisma/schema.prisma && npx prisma migrate deploy --schema=server/prisma/schema.prisma
